### Insight 1: integration hook dispatch pattern

The integration hook dispatch pattern using Agent subagents is now confirmed working in all three hook event types: UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, and SessionStart. This pattern is the canonical approach for all future hook-to-skill chains.

**Promote?:** yes
**Applies to:** /implement, /end_of_day

### Insight 2: dispatch sentinel prevents recursion

The [no-redispatch] sentinel in the subagent prompt reliably prevents infinite recursion in §0 model dispatch. Confirmed across all 12 cheap-tier skills and manually verified via verify_subagent_dispatch.md.

**Promote?:** yes
**Applies to:** /implement, /gate
